normalized_signature: -- ============================================= -- author:		강덕재 -- create date: 2016-01-16 -- description:	채팅 메시지 발생시 트리거 -- ============================================= create trigger [dbo].[crewchat_message_trigger] on dbo.crewchat_messages    after insert as  begin 	declare @roomno bigint,  			@messageno bigint,  			@writeuserno int,  			@type int, 			@message nvarchar(max), 			@attachno int, 			@regdate datetime 	 	select @messageno=messageno, @roomno=roomno, @writeuserno=userno,  	       @type = type, @message = message, @attachno = attachno, @regdate = regdate 	from inserted 	 	-- 메시지 작성자는 읽은 것으로 추가한다. 	if @type = 0 or @type = 2 or @type = 3  -- 0:일반메시지, 1:시스템메시지, 2:첨부파일, 3:html메시지 	begin 		insert into crewchat_checkmessage (messageno, roomno, userno, isread, moddate, regdate) 		values (@messageno, @roomno, @writeuserno, 1, getdate(), @regdate) 		 		-- 해당 채팅방 유저들 모두 추가한다.(작성자 제외) 		insert into crewchat_checkmessage (messageno, roomno, userno, isread, moddate, regdate) 		select @messageno, @roomno, r.userno, 0, getdate(), @regdate 		from crewchat_roomusers r 		inner join organization_users u on u.userno = r.userno 		where roomno = @roomno and r.userno != @writeuserno and u.enabled=1 		 		-- 해당방의 최신 메시지 업데이트 		 		declare @lastedmsgattachtype int 		declare @lastedmsgattachname nvarchar(300) 		set @lastedmsgattachtype = 0 		set @lastedmsgattachname = '' 		if @attachno > 0 		begin 			set @lastedmsgattachtype =  			(select [type] from crewchat_attach where attachno=@attachno) 			set @lastedmsgattachname =  			(select [filename] from crewchat_attach where attachno=@attachno) 		end  		if @type = 3 		begin 			set @message = (select value from dbo.uf_text_split(@message, '|') where position=1) 		end 		 		if (select count(*) from crewchat_messages where roomno=@roomno and regdate>@regdate)=0 		begin 		update crewchat_rooms set lastedmsg=@message, lastedmsgdate=@regdate,  		lastedmsgno = @messageno, 		lastedmsgtype=@type, lastedmsgattachno=@attachno,  		lastedmsgattachtype = @lastedmsgattachtype, 		lastedmsgattachname = @lastedmsgattachname 		where roomno = @roomno 		end 	end 	 	 end

-- ============================================= -- author: 허욱 -- create date: 2014-06-03 -- description: 예약 알림 트리거 -- ============================================= create trigger [notify_resourcersvn] on [scheduleresourcereservationsrevision] after insert as begin declare @rsvnno int declare @isnotimail bit declare @isnotipopup bit declare @resourceno int declare @buygroupno int declare @mainmanagerno int declare @submanagerno int declare @action char(1) /*set @action = (case when exists(select * from inserted) and exists(select * from deleted) then 'u' when exists(select * from inserted) then 'i' when exists(select * from deleted) then 'd' else null end)*/ select @rsvnno = reservationno, @action = revisiontype from inserted if @action = 'i' or @action = 'u' begin select @rsvnno = reservationno, @isnotimail = isnotimail, @isnotipopup = isnotipopup, @resourceno = resourceno from scheduleresourcereservations where reservationno = @resourceno -- 업데이트인 경우 기존 거 삭제 if @action = 'u' begin delete from bizsoftnotify where notifytype = 'resource' and notifytypeno = @rsvnno delete from bizsoftnotifymail where module = 'resource' and moduleno = @rsvnno end select @buygroupno = buygroupno from scheduleresources where resourceno = @resourceno select @mainmanagerno = mainmanagerno, @submanagerno = submanagerno from scheduleresourcesbuygroup where buygroupno = @buygroupno declare @usernolist table ( userno int, userid varchar(100), name nvarchar(100) ) insert @usernolist select rp.userno, u.userid, u.name from scheduleresourceparticipants rp inner join organization_users u on rp.userno = u.userno where reservationno = @rsvnno and rp.userno <> 0 insert @usernolist select bd.userno, u.userid, u.name from organization_belongtodepartment bd inner join organization_users u on bd.userno = u.userno where departno in (select userno from scheduleresourceparticipants where reservationno = @rsvnno and departno <> 0) -- 자원관리자 if @mainmanagerno > 0 and @mainmanagerno is not null begin insert @usernolist select @mainmanagerno, (select userid from organization_users where userno = @mainmanagerno),(select name from organization_users where userno = @mainmanagerno) end -- 서브 자원관리자 if @submanagerno > 0 and @submanagerno is not null begin insert @usernolist select @submanagerno, (select userid from organization_users where userno = @submanagerno),(select name from organization_users where userno = @submanagerno) end insert into bizsoftnotify ( notifytype, notifytypeno, notifytitle, notifyuserno ) select 'resource', sr.reservationno, sr.title, u.userno from scheduleresourcereservations sr, (select distinct userno from @usernolist) u where reservationno = @rsvnno -- 메일알림(자원예약에 대한 전체 알림) insert into [biz_center].[dbo].[bizsoftnotifymail] ( [regdate] ,[reguserno] ,[module] ,[moduleno] ,[rsvnsenddate] ,[fromname] ,[fromaddr] ,[mailto] ,[cc] ,[bcc] ,[subject] ,[contents] ,[isonebyone] ,[ispriority] ) select getdate(), sr.reguserno, 'resource', sr.reservationno, getdate(), dbo.comngetusername(sr.reguserno), (select userid from organization_users where userno = sr.reguserno), m.mailto, '', -- cc '', -- bcc '[bizsoft/메일알림] 자원예약안내 - ' + sr.title, -- 제목 ''+ '
다음과 같이 자원이 예약되었습니다.

'+ '
임직원분들은 해당 자원예약시 주의 바랍니다.

'+ '' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' '+ ' '+ ' '+ ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + '
제목' + sr.title + '
예약한 자원'+ (select name from scheduleresources where resourceno = sr.resourceno)+'
내용' + sr.content + '
작성자' + dbo.comngetusername(sr.reguserno) + '
공유' + (select stuff((select distinct ',' + name from @usernolist b for xml path('')),1,1,'')) + '
날짜' + case when sr.startdate = sr.enddate then convert(varchar,sr.startdate,102) else convert(varchar,sr.startdate,102) + ' ~ ' + convert(varchar,sr.enddate,102) end + '
시간' + convert(varchar,sr.starttime,108) + ' ~ ' + convert(varchar,sr.endtime,108) + '
', -- 내용 0, 0 from scheduleresourcereservations sr, (select replace(replace(stuff((select distinct ',' + name +'<' + userid + '>' from organization_users b where [enabled] = 1 for xml path('')),1,1,''),'<','<'),'>','>') as mailto) m where sr.reservationno = @rsvnno if @isnotimail = 1 begin -- 메일알림(지정시간 알림) insert into [biz_center].[dbo].[bizsoftnotifymail] ( [regdate] ,[reguserno] ,[module] ,[moduleno] ,[rsvnsenddate] ,[fromname] ,[fromaddr] ,[mailto] ,[cc] ,[bcc] ,[subject] ,[contents] ,[isonebyone] ,[ispriority] ) select getdate(), sr.reguserno, 'resource', sr.reservationno, case when notitimetype = 1 then cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime) when notitimetype = 2 then dateadd(mi,-5,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 3 then dateadd(mi,-10,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 4 then dateadd(mi,-15,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 5 then dateadd(mi,-30,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 6 then dateadd(hh,-1,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 7 then dateadd(hh,-2,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 8 then dateadd(hh,-3,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 9 then dateadd(hh,-12,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 10 then dateadd(hh,-24,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 11 then dateadd(hh,-48,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) else getdate() end as notitime, dbo.comngetusername(sr.reguserno), (select userid from organization_users where userno = sr.reguserno), m.mailto, '', -- cc '', -- bcc '[bizsoft/메일알림] 자원예약 - ' + sr.title, -- 제목 ''+ '
다음과 같이 자원이 예약되었습니다.


'+ '' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' '+ ' '+ ' '+ ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + '
제목' + sr.title + '
예약한 자원'+ (select name from scheduleresources where resourceno = sr.resourceno)+'
내용' + sr.content + '
작성자' + dbo.comngetusername(sr.reguserno) + '
공유' + (select stuff((select distinct ',' + name from @usernolist b for xml path('')),1,1,'')) + '
날짜' + case when sr.startdate = sr.enddate then convert(varchar,sr.startdate,102) else convert(varchar,sr.startdate,102) + ' ~ ' + convert(varchar,sr.enddate,102) end + '
시간' + convert(varchar,sr.starttime,108) + ' ~ ' + convert(varchar,sr.endtime,108) + '
', -- 내용 0, 0 from scheduleresourcereservations sr, (select replace(replace(stuff((select distinct ',' + name +'<' + userid + '>' from @usernolist b for xml path('')),1,1,''),'<','<'),'>','>') as mailto) m where sr.reservationno = @rsvnno and isnotimail = 1 end if @isnotipopup = 1 begin -- 팝업 알림 기능 추가 insert into bizsoftnotify ( notifytype, notifytypeno, notifytitle, notifydate, notifyuserno, notifystatus ) select 'popup' as notifytype, reservationno, title, case when notitimetype = 1 then cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime) when notitimetype = 2 then dateadd(mi,-5,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 3 then dateadd(mi,-10,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 4 then dateadd(mi,-15,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 5 then dateadd(mi,-30,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 6 then dateadd(hh,-1,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 7 then dateadd(hh,-2,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 8 then dateadd(hh,-3,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 9 then dateadd(hh,-12,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 10 then dateadd(hh,-24,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 11 then dateadd(hh,-48,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) end as notitime, u.userno, 'resource' from scheduleresourcereservations sr, (select distinct userno from @usernolist) u where reservationno = @rsvnno and isnotipopup = 1 end end else if @action = 'd' begin delete from bizsoftnotify where notifytype = 'resource' and notifytypeno = @rsvnno delete from bizsoftnotifymail where module = 'resource' and moduleno = @rsvnno end end

-- ============================================= -- author: 허욱 -- create date: 2014-05-23 -- description: 일정 알림 트리거 -- ============================================= create trigger [notify_schedule] on [schedulecontentshistory] after insert as begin declare @scheduleno int declare @isnotimail int declare @isnotipopup bit declare @reguserno int declare @action char(1) /*set @action = (case when exists(select * from inserted) and exists(select * from deleted) then 'u' when exists(select * from inserted) then 'i' when exists(select * from deleted) then 'd' else null end)*/ select @scheduleno = scheduleno, @action = historytype from inserted if @action = 'i' or @action = 'u' begin select @scheduleno = scheduleno, @isnotimail = isnotimail, @isnotipopup = isnotipopup, @reguserno = reguserno from schedulecontents where scheduleno = @scheduleno -- 업데이트인 경우 기존 거 삭제 if @action = 'u' begin delete from bizsoftnotify where notifytype = 'schedule' and notifytypeno = @scheduleno delete from bizsoftnotify where notifytype = 'popup' and notifystatus = 'schedule' and notifytypeno = @scheduleno delete from bizsoftnotifymail where module = 'schedule' and moduleno = @scheduleno end -- 사용자 / 부서 공유 정보 생성 declare @usernolist table ( userno int, userid varchar(100), name nvarchar(100) ) -- 보낸 사용자 목록 생성 insert @usernolist select @reguserno, (select userid from users where userno = @reguserno),(select name from users where userno = @reguserno) -- 일반 사용자 목록 생성 insert @usernolist select scs.userno, u.userid, u.name from schedulecontentsharers scs inner join organization_users u on scs.userno = u.userno where scs.scheduleno = @scheduleno and scs.userno <> 0 -- 부서소속 사용자 목록 생성 insert @usernolist select bd.userno, u.userid, u.name from organization_belongtodepartment bd inner join organization_users u on bd.userno = u.userno where departno in (select userno from schedulecontentsharers where scheduleno = @scheduleno and departno <> 0) -- 참여자 정보 생성 declare @joinlist table ( userseq int, username nvarchar(200), email nvarchar(50) ) -- 참여자 (주소록/개별) insert @joinlist select userseq, username, email from ( select c.userseq, u.lastname + u.firstname as username, isnull((select top 1 value from contactsemail e where e.userseq = c.userseq order by isdefault desc),'') as email from schedulecontentscontacts c inner join contactsuser u on u.seq = c.userseq where scheduleno = @scheduleno and userseq > 0 ) a --where len(rtrim(ltrim(email))) > 0 -- 참여자 (주소록/그룹) insert @joinlist select userseq, username, email from ( select u.seq as userseq, u.lastname + u.firstname as username, isnull((select top 1 value from contactsemail e where e.userseq = u.seq order by isdefault desc),'') as email from schedulecontentscontacts c inner join contactsgroupuser g on c.groupno = g.groupno inner join contactsuser u on u.seq = g.userseq where c.scheduleno = @scheduleno and c.groupno > 0 ) a --where len(rtrim(ltrim(email))) > 0 -- 신규 insert into bizsoftnotify ( notifytype, notifytypeno, notifytitle, notifyuserno ) select 'schedule', sc.scheduleno, sc.title, u.userno from schedulecontents sc, (select distinct userno from @usernolist where userno = @reguserno) u where scheduleno = @scheduleno -- 메일 알림시.. if @isnotimail = 1 begin -- 사용자 부서 메일알림 insert into [biz_center].[dbo].[bizsoftnotifymail] ([regdate] ,[reguserno] ,[module] ,[moduleno] ,[rsvnsenddate] ,[fromname] ,[fromaddr] ,[mailto] ,[cc] ,[bcc] ,[subject] ,[contents] ,[isonebyone] ,[ispriority]) select getdate(), sc.reguserno, 'schedule', sc.scheduleno, case when notitimetype = 1 then then dateadd(hh,-2,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 8 then dateadd(hh,-3,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 9 then dateadd(hh,-12,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 10 then dateadd(hh,-24,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) when notitimetype = 11 then dateadd(hh,-48,cast(startdate as datetime) + cast(starttime as datetime)) else getdate() end as notitime, dbo.comngetusername(sc.reguserno), (select userid from organization_users where userno = sc.reguserno), m.mailto, -- mailto '', -- cc '', -- bcc '[bizsoft/메일알림] 일정 - '+sc.title, -- 제목 ''+ '' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + '

notifystatus = 'schedule' and notifytypeno = @scheduleno delete from biz_company.dbo.bizsoftnotifymail where module = 'schedule' and moduleno = @scheduleno end end

-- ============================================= -- author:		허욱 -- create date: 2014-06-05 -- description:	sns 알림 기능  -- ============================================= create trigger [notify_snsmessages]    on  [snsmessages]    after insert as  begin 	declare @messageno int 	declare @reguserno int 	declare @groupno int 	 	select @messageno = messageno, @reguserno = userno, @groupno = groupno from inserted 	 	declare @usernolist table ( 		userno int 	) 	 	insert @usernolist 	select @reguserno 	 	insert @usernolist 	select userno from snsgroupusers where groupno = @groupno 	 	insert into biz_center.dbo.bizsoftnotify 	( 		notifytype, 		notifytypeno, 		notifytitle, 		notifydate, 		notifyuserno, 		notifystatus 	) 	select  		 		'sns' as notifytype, 		sm.messageno, 		--substring('[' + sg.groupname + ' - '+ dbo.comngetusername(sm.userno) + ' ' + dbo.uf_positionname(sm.userno) + '] ' + sm.[message],1,100) + case when len('[' + sg.groupname + ' - '+ dbo.comngetusername(sm.userno) + '' + dbo.uf_positionname(sm.userno) + '] ' + sm.[message]) > 100 then '...' else '' end as notifymsg, 		'[' + sg.groupname + ']에 ' + dbo.comngetusername(sm.userno) + ' ' + dbo.uf_positionname(sm.userno) + '이(가) 새 글을 작성하였습니다.' as notifymsg, 		getdate() as notifydate, 		sgu.userno, 		'message' as notifystatus 	from snsmessages sm 	inner join snsgroups sg on sg.groupno = sm.groupno,  	(select distinct userno from @usernolist) sgu 	where sm.messageno = @messageno end

-- ============================================= -- author:		허욱 -- create date: 2014-06-05 -- description:	sns 알림 댓글 기능  -- ============================================= create trigger [notify_snsreplys]    on  [snsreplys]    after insert as  begin 	declare @replyno int 	declare @reguserno int 	declare @groupno int 	 	select @replyno = replyno, @reguserno = userno, @groupno = groupno from inserted 	 	declare @usernolist table ( 		userno int 	) 	 	insert @usernolist 	select @reguserno 	 	insert @usernolist 	select userno from snsgroupusers where groupno = @groupno 	 	insert into biz_center.dbo.bizsoftnotify 	( 		notifytype, 		notifytypeno, 		notifytitle, 		notifydate, 		notifyuserno, 		notifystatus 	) 	select  		'sns' as notifytype, 		sm.messageno, 		--substring('[' + sg.groupname + ' 댓글 - '+ dbo.comngetusername(sm.userno) + ' ' + dbo.uf_positionname(sm.userno) + '] ' + sm.[message],1,100) + case when len('[' + sg.groupname + ' 댓글 - '+ dbo.comngetusername(sm.userno) + '' + dbo.uf_positionname(sm.userno) + '] ' + sm.[message]) > 100 then '...' else '' end as notifymsg, 		'[' + sg.groupname + ']에 ' + dbo.comngetusername(sm.userno) + ' ' + dbo.uf_positionname(sm.userno) + '이(가) 댓글을 달았습니다.' as notifymsg, 		getdate() as notifydate, 		sgu.userno, 		'reply' as notifystatus 	from snsreplys sm 	inner join snsgroups sg on sg.groupno = sm.groupno,  	(select distinct userno from @usernolist) sgu 	where sm.replyno = @replyno end

-- ============================================= -- author: 허욱 -- create date: 2014-06-03 -- description: 할일 팝업 알림 트리거 -- ============================================= create trigger [notify_todo] on [scheduletodoshistory] after insert as begin declare @todono int declare @isnotimail bit declare @isnotipopup bit declare @completedate date declare @reguserno int declare @action char(1) /*set @action = (case when exists(select * from inserted) and exists(select * from deleted) then 'u' when exists(select * from inserted) then 'i' when exists(select * from deleted) then 'd' else null end)*/ select @todono = todono, @action = historytype from inserted if @action = 'i' or @action = 'u' begin select @todono = todono, @reguserno = reguserno, @isnotimail = isnotimail, @isnotipopup = isnotipopup, @completedate = completedate from scheduletodos where todono = @todono if @action = 'u' begin delete from bizsoftnotify where notifytype = 'popup' and notifystatus = 'todo' and notifytypeno = @todono delete from bizsoftnotifymail where module = 'todo' and moduleno = @todono end declare @usernolist table ( userno int, userid varchar(100), name nvarchar(100) ) -- 보낸 사용자 목록 생성 insert @usernolist select @reguserno, (select userid from organization_users where userno = @reguserno),(select name from organization_users where userno = @reguserno) -- 일반 사용자 목록 생성 insert @usernolist select sts.userno, u.userid, u.name from scheduletodosharers sts inner join organization_users u on sts.userno = u.userno where sts.todono = @todono and sts.userno <> 0 -- 부서소속 사용자 목록 생성 insert @usernolist select bd.userno, u.userid, u.name from organization_belongtodepartment bd inner join organization_users u on bd.userno = u.userno where departno in (select userno from scheduletodosharers where todono = @todono and departno <> 0) if @isnotimail = 1 and @completedate is not null begin insert into [biz_center].[dbo].[bizsoftnotifymail] ([regdate] ,[reguserno] ,[module] ,[moduleno] ,[rsvnsenddate] ,[fromname] ,[fromaddr] ,[mailto] ,[cc] ,[bcc] ,[subject] ,[contents] ,[isonebyone] ,[ispriority] ) select getdate(), reguserno, 'todo', todono, case when notitimetype = 1 then cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime) when notitimetype = 2 then dateadd(mi,-5,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 3 then dateadd(mi,-10,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 4 then dateadd(mi,-15,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 5 then dateadd(mi,-30,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 6 then dateadd(hh,-1,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 7 then dateadd(hh,-2,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 8 then dateadd(hh,-3,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 9 then dateadd(hh,-12,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 10 then dateadd(hh,-24,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 11 then dateadd(hh,-48,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) end as notitime, dbo.comngetusername(t.reguserno), (select userid from organization_users where userno = t.reguserno), m.mailto,-- mailto '', -- cc '', -- bcc '[bizsoft/메일알림] 할일 - ' + title, ''+ '' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' '+ ' ' + '
제목' + title + '
작성자' + dbo.comngetusername(reguserno) + '
중요도
진척율'+convert(varchar(3),isnull(progressrate,'0'))+'%
완료일' + convert(varchar,completedate,102) + '
', 0, 0 from scheduletodos t, (select replace(replace(stuff((select distinct ',' + name +'<' + userid + '>' from @usernolist b for xml path('')),1,1,''),'<','<'),'>','>') as mailto) m where todono = @todono and isnotimail = 1 end if @isnotipopup = 1 and @completedate is not null begin insert into bizsoftnotify ( notifytype, notifytypeno, notifytitle, notifydate, notifyuserno, notifystatus ) select 'popup', todono, title, case when notitimetype = 1 then cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime) when notitimetype = 2 then dateadd(mi,-5,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 3 then dateadd(mi,-10,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 4 then dateadd(mi,-15,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 5 then dateadd(mi,-30,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 6 then dateadd(hh,-1,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 7 then dateadd(hh,-2,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 8 then dateadd(hh,-3,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 9 then dateadd(hh,-12,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 10 then dateadd(hh,-24,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) when notitimetype = 11 then dateadd(hh,-48,cast(completedate as datetime) + cast('09:00:00' as datetime)) end as notitime, u.userno, 'todo' from scheduletodos t, (select distinct userno from @usernolist) u where todono = @todono end end else begin select @todono = todono from deleted delete from bizsoftnotify where notifytype = 'popup' and notifystatus = 'todo' and notifytypeno = @todono delete from bizsoftnotifymail where module = 'todo' and moduleno = @todono end end

create trigger [dbo].[organization_departments_board_updatepermissionsbyparent]     on [dbo].[organization_departments]     after insert     as      	begin 		declare @userno int; 		declare @departno int; 	 		select @userno = moduserno from inserted 		select @departno = departno  from inserted 	 	exec board_updatepermissionsbyparent @departno,@userno     end

create  view [dbo].[edmsmainlist] as select     d.id, d.title, d.writerid, d.regdate, d.state, d.checkoutid, d.departid, d.version, d.authoritylevel, d.doclevel, d.eadocflag, d.moddate,isnull(d.moddate,d.regdate) updatedate, d.groupcode, d.serial, d.keyword, isnull(d.hit, 0) as hit,  200 as eaauth, d.summary                       from dbo.edmsdocument as d  where     (d.docstate = 0) and (d.isdelete = 'n') and (d.versionstate = 'y') and (d.valdate > getdate())

create view dbo.note_lattachments as select  attachmentno, userno, fileurl, listno as noteno, typefile, daycreate as datecreated, dayedit as datechanged, fileuri as fileuri, realpath, isavatar as isrepresentative,                 attachtimezone as timezoneoffsetofdatecreated, filesize, filename from     dbo.note_attachment

create view dbo.note_lcomments as select  commentno, listno as noteno, reguserno as userno, regdate as datecreated, moduserno, moddate as datechanged, [content], regtimezone as timezoneoffsetofdatecreated,                 modtimezone as timezoneoffsetofdatechanged, readuserlist, parentid as parentno, contenthtml from     dbo.note_comments
create view dbo.note_lgroups as select  groupno, name, orderpostion, daycreate as datecreated, dayedit as datechanged, userno, show, icon, checkdelete as isdefault from     dbo.note_group

create view dbo.note_lnotes as select  listno as noteno, name, groupno, userno, description, latitude, longitude, daycreate as datecreated, dayedit as datechanged, show,                 notetimezonecreate as timezoneoffsetofdatecreated, notetimezoneedit as timezoneoffsetofdatechanged, favoritetype as isfavorite, readdate as dateread,                 notetimezoneread as timezoneoffsetofdateread from     dbo.note_list

create view dbo.note_lsharers as select  shareno, userno, listno as noteno, daycreate as datecreated, dayedit as datechanged, usershare, groupno, convert(int, isread) as isread, readdate as dateread, isreads,                 favoritetype as isfavorite, sharetype, timeoffset as timezoneoffsetofdateread, companyno, sharecompanyno from     dbo.note_share

create view [dbo].[vacation_sum] as select  		r.usernoi 	, sum( case when isnull(t1.special,0) != 1 then r.timedis else 0 end) as addition1 -- addition normal 	, sum( case when t1.special = 1 then r.timedis else 0 end) as addition2 -- addition special addition2 	, sum(r.timedis)  as timedis -- addition  	, year(r.tod) as years 	, usevacationcnt = (select sum(vacationscount) from vacation_requests v  			join vacation_types t on v.typeid = t.typeid where t.special =1 and v.userno = r.usernoi and year(v.tod) = year(r.tod)) from  vacation_requesteps r  left join vacation_types t1 on r.typeid = t1.typeid group by r.usernoi, year(r.tod)

create view [dbo].[vacation_sumrequest] as select  	sum(vacationscount) used 	, rq.userno -- 	, sum(case when isnull(t.special,0) = 0 then vacationscount else 0 end) used1 -- basicc used 	, sum(case when t.special = 1 then vacationscount else 0 end) used2 -- sepecial used 	, year(rq.tod) as years from vacation_requests rq  left join vacation_types t on rq.typeid = t.typeid where rq.statusadmin != 1  group by rq.userno,  year(rq.tod)
